texto: Here’s my usual party strategy: find the liquor, find the food, find the space where two walls meet. Alienate enough people around you to have some breathing room. Find the attractive people—this shouldn’t take long; they’ll be the ones getting everything they want in life. Once you’ve found them, stare hungrily at them all evening, and interpret every alarmed flicker of eye contact from them as a new stage in your relationship.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Isaac Oliver sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “Here’s my usual party strategy: find the liquor, find the food, find the space where two walls me…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a amizade, attraction, humor, útil em momentos de amizade e humor.
